{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322073831D8C620B9DC5A09AA31F1"}"},"total":1474},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7368411812731077400","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"黑科技帮助国家！主角人设不错！得到系统后并没有贸然进军高科技行业，而是从酒业开始，一步一步积累资金，累积科技与人才！由小见大，由点及面，把自己立起来当靶子，引导太空竞赛，让国内企业一步步累积技术，产品推进至国产化！格局很大！期待后续引导全国走向星际化！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715595427,"group_id":"7095751498717465632","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"🌈愿你被世界温柔以待。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6prte8vXDeH9Kjj2V+XfofAv8Y7R5E67+vA2Bmim0UT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2c211c35579d41c7ae164d7f7c06809a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708761&x-signature=zffM9izVKzP6%2Bs2zFszVrnTY8qo%3D","user_id":"2212687787338551","user_name":"深蓝色的鬼啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2212687787338551","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1763772567,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":27,"name":"载酒寻歌","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/28226e4bdb6c5450ec776ade3d8ca1e9~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/28226e4bdb6c5450ec776ade3d8ca1e9~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7095751498717465632","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+都市+商业+科技+科幻+军工+强国】

……
刘森运用获得的金手指提升着各种物品的属性，获得相应的知识，创建公司，研发新科技。
从最简单的酒水饮料开始积累资金，稳扎稳打。

碾压民用科技公司，并且涉及军工科技。

"7550614002818286360","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"评价一下：不错，一件事方方面面都考虑到了，没什么问题，这是我在番茄一次把这么长的看完，让我有种在起点的感觉！我18年书虫了，这本书可以看，即便是水也没问题，也不是强行水，我还没跳过章节看，都是仔细看完的！追到最新了，哦。还忘了点催更……
听作者说这是写的第一本书？那可真是不错了，我看了那么多年，这第一本能写的面面俱到，没什么明显漏洞的不算太多，可以长期坚持写下去，就是这速度实在是一言难尽……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758016941,"group_id":"7095751498717465632","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2KDx3tHe7nGMe0EYkVwMjB0nIr13Pk9xDiX1kS1vTqv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1168161913452441","user_name":"洪兴国的牙琉响也"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1168161913452441","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7095751498717465632","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文+都市+商业+科技+科幻+军工+强国】
